detail.description:
"My lord! I want to play basketball!"

You read that right! Even military generals are teaming up for street basketball! *Time-Traveling Streetball Showdown* is the first ancient-style 3V3 street basketball competitive mobile game featuring the strongest military generals! The river of history flows steadily forward, but the unfinished business and regrets of heroes have created turbulent currents in what was once a calm river. Your "Hengmingsi" is the institution that handles these temporal ano
